blocks.content: The Genius Who Lost His Light (5)

blocks.speaker: Viltor Akein
blocks.content: The Grand Sorcerer... is it you, Viltor Akein?
The man was covered in blood.
He had handsome features, and his eyes shone sharply like gun barrels.

blocks.speaker: Viltor Akein
blocks.content: You don't seem like the type to be swayed by money. Who are you?

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: My name is Mirhi Alpheas. I had no other way to meet you, so I came directly.
Oh?
Akein's eyebrows rose.
It made no sense for someone holed up in a dungeon to be completely ignorant of the outside world.
Through secret channels, he had already learned of Alpheas' photon theory.

blocks.speaker: Viltor Akein
blocks.content: A light mage seeking out a dark mage. How peculiar. Sit down first. Let me heal you.
Akein activated a life-sustaining device.
Alpheas entered the hemispherical device filled with green liquid and immediately fell into a deep sleep upon submersion.
Three hours later.

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: Gah! Hah!
Alpheas jerked his upper body above the water's surface.
He had nearly suffocated.
But how had he been able to sleep?
As he turned his head in confusion, he saw Akein sitting at a desk, writing a thesis.
The man looked more like a scholar than the grand sorcerer who had once thrown the continent into chaos.

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: Thank you for the treatment. This is quite a device. I'm curious about its principles.

blocks.speaker: Viltor Akein
blocks.content: No need for small talk. That doesn't change the fact that you're an uninvited guest. Tell me why you sought me out.

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: I want to learn dark magic. Please take me as your disciple.

blocks.speaker: Viltor Akein
blocks.content: Oh?
Even for someone like Akein, this was undeniably intriguing.

blocks.speaker: Viltor Akein
blocks.content: Do you have a special reason?

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: I have a wife. But her intellectual abilities are lacking. I heard rumors that you're researching memory storage through dark magic. I want to give my memories to my wife.
Akein's eyes flashed.
Since they were both well-versed in each other's fields, no lengthy explanation was needed.

blocks.speaker: Viltor Akein
blocks.content: I've done considerable research on memory manipulation. But what you're asking is on a different level. There are issues with personality transfer, and above all, it would require transferring an entire lifetime's worth of memories.

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: I believe it's possible. By combining the absorptive properties of dark magic with photons' information-transfer capabilities, we could potentially create artificial intelligence.

blocks.speaker: Viltor Akein
blocks.content: Hmm, using photon magic to construct a neural network and imprint memories onto it?
It was certainly a novel idea.
Until now, photon magic had been limited in utility, often referred to as time magic.
But with the photon theory now revealed, Akein expected it to make breakthroughs in information fields.

blocks.speaker: Viltor Akein
blocks.content: Before we examine the theory, I have one question. Did your wife consent to this experiment?

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: She doesn't know yet. But she will agree.

blocks.speaker: Viltor Akein
blocks.content: There must be a story behind this.
Alpheas explained the circumstances that had led him here.
After hearing his story, Akein understood his feelings.
Moreover, the proposal was undeniably genius.

blocks.speaker: Viltor Akein
blocks.content: Fine. If you're truly prepared to stake your life on this, I'll take you as my disciple. But convincing your family won't be easy.

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: Thank you. I'll bring my family here soon.
Upon returning home, Alpheas discussed it with Erina.
Since it was a life-altering decision, Klump was also present.

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: I want to learn dark magic. Please take me as your disciple.

blocks.speaker: Klump
blocks.content: Alpheas, what are you saying? Why would you seek out such a person? He's a criminal!

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: That doesn't matter to a mage. What truly matters is that he's the most knowledgeable about dark magic on the continent. He's also an expert on human memory and brain structure. It won't be a loss.

blocks.speaker: Klump
blocks.content: No, it will be! You're bewitched! Implanting memories into a human brain? That's impossible!

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: Klump, the reason you think that way is—

blocks.speaker: Klump
blocks.content: Yeah! I'm stupid! Not as smart as you, not a genius! But even I know one thing: you're throwing away a blessing. Associating with someone like him will get your position in Thunder revoked. What about your family? They'll disown you!

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: I don't care. Those things can't dictate my life. Thunder, my family—none of it matters. If Erina can be happy, I'll be happier than I am now.

blocks.speaker: Erina
blocks.content: Darling, I'll do it.

blocks.speaker: Klump
blocks.content: Sister-in-law! This needs more thought!

blocks.speaker: Erina
blocks.content: I'll do it. Because I trust my husband. Alpheas will make me happy.

blocks.speaker: Klump
blocks.content: Of course! Who do you think I am? A mage who earned the Gold Circle. And my master is the grand sorcerer. Together, we can easily fix your shortcomings.
Klump visited daily to persuade Alpheas, but the couple's resolve was unshakable.
Eventually, Alpheas liquidated all his assets and entered Akein's dungeon with Erina.

blocks.speaker: Viltor Akein
blocks.content: Welcome. I'm Viltor Akein.

blocks.speaker: Erina
blocks.content: Hello. My husband is indebted to you.
Erina bowed respectfully.
Now that he was her husband's master, she couldn't be careless.

blocks.speaker: Viltor Akein
blocks.content: Don't worry too much. I've devoted decades to this field. You've made a big decision. If we succeed, we can cure countless mental illnesses. Your husband will also gain fame beyond what Thunder could offer.

blocks.speaker: Erina
blocks.content: Becoming the grand sorcerer's disciple. And if success meant reclaiming everything her husband had sacrificed, Erina thought it worth trying.
For the next two years, Alpheas stayed in the dungeon, researching memory transfer for his wife.
Akein, who operated his own dungeon, was an expert in experimentation.
Under his rational care, Erina lived there without much discomfort.

blocks.speaker: Klump
blocks.content: Hey, sister-in-law. How are you?

blocks.speaker: Erina
blocks.content: I'm fine. The experiment will end soon. Then my husband can return to the world.

blocks.speaker: Klump
blocks.content: You're here? Thanks, as always.

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: You're here? Thanks, as always.

blocks.speaker: Klump
blocks.content: How's the experiment? Any progress?

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: Almost done. The clinical trials were successful. Next month, Erina will be free from those condescending stares.

blocks.speaker: Klump
blocks.content: Next month? That soon?

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: What are you talking about? It's been two years. The master and I worked day and night. Anyway, you must come that day. Bring alcohol instead of food.
The month felt endless to everyone.
But time passed, and the long-awaited moment arrived.
Erina lay on a bed, waiting.
Akein and Alpheas were too busy checking the machinery, so Klump kept her company to ease her nerves.

blocks.speaker: Klump
blocks.content: Sister-in-law, how do you feel? After today, you'll have Alpheas's memories. Even the time he wet the bed as a child. Think hard if he ever glanced at another woman. Hahaha!

blocks.speaker: Erina
blocks.content: Let's begin, Erina.

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: Darling, thank you.

blocks.speaker: Erina
blocks.content: Don't mention it. I'm the grateful one. You endured so much. Let's live happily. Have children too.
Alpheas worried if his smile looked forced.
Honestly, he was so tense he felt like fainting.
Akein approached and attached devices to their heads.
This experiment combined the pinnacle of magical engineering, magical biology, alchemy, photon dynamics, and human biology.

blocks.speaker: Viltor Akein
blocks.content: We'll begin now. Relax. It'll be over soon.
As Akein prepared to activate the device, Klump stepped aside, nervously wringing his hands.
With a clank, the machinery descended.
Dozens of components whirred, and crystals emitted chaotic light.

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: Gah!
Erina's eyes flew open.
As massive amounts of information flooded in, sparks flew from her eyes.
From Alpheas's earliest memory to their recent conversation, every moment of his life was transmitted at light speed.

blocks.speaker: Erina
blocks.content: Darling, thank you. And I love you.
Erina closed her eyes.
No regrets. She had received more love than she deserved in this life.

blocks.speaker: Erina
blocks.content: Meeting Alpheas... was my greatest fortune.
As the light faded, the experiment ended.
Akein checked the gauges.
100% information transfer rate. All memories had been perfectly delivered.

blocks.speaker: Mirhi Alpheas
blocks.content: Darling! Darling!
Alpheas turned to Erina.
Her pale face was covered in cold sweat.
